---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new tool, behavior change, or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature solves. What are you currently unable to do?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If proposing a new tool:

- Tool name (follow `paperclip_<verb>_<noun>` convention)
- Paperclip API endpoint it maps to
- Required input fields
- Expected output shape

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Links to Paperclip API docs, related issues, or prior discussion.
